title: Gentle Saudi Arabian Custard Tagine
description: A soothing dessert inspired by traditional Saudi flavors, featuring a creamy custard base infused with gentle spices and a touch of Arabian charm.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, custard powder, and sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove from heat and stir in the rice flour, vegetable oil, and rose water. Let cool slightly.
Pour the mixture into ramekins or small baking dishes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set and the centers are slightly jiggly.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Garnish with chopped pistachios before serving.
